top_signals.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
top_signals.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Europe Heat Wave Sends Power Prices Soaring as Alerts Spread
top_signals.summary: A heat wave gripping western Europe is forecast to strengthen this week, with days of dangerously hot and humid conditions and record-breaking temperatures in France, the UK, Spain and Germany.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: PRA sets out adjustments to its market risk internal model approach under Basel 3.1
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has today published a consultation on the internal model approach to market risk (IMA), which represents the final piece of Basel 3.1’s implementation in the UK.

top_signals.title: Crypto trading app Fomo raises $75 million at $550 million valuation in Index Ventures-led Series B
top_signals.summary: Fomo raised a $75 million Series B round at a $550 million valuation led by Index Ventures, Fortune reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Webinar: How attackers bypass MFA and how defenders can respond
top_signals.summary: Modern phishing attacks, including Device Code phishing, can undermine MFA protections and grant attackers access to corporate accounts without stealing passwords. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help security teams detect compromised accounts faster and automate response workflows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
